mission.title: backstage: [TechDocs] Implement a DefaultTechDocsCollator
mission.description: [TechDocs] Implement a DefaultTechDocsCollator. Requested by 13+ users.

steps.title: Check current backstage setup
steps.description:
Verify your backstage version and configuration:
```bash
npx backstage-cli info
```
This feature requires a working backstage installation.

steps.title: Review backstage configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant backstage configuration:
## What / why

In #4438, we introduced the concept of a Search collator, which is a class that a plugin can export whose purpose is to return all indexable documents the plugin is responsible for.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [TechDocs] Implement a DefaultTechDocsCollator
steps.description:
## Hey, I just made a Pull Request!

Ref: https://github.com/backstage/backstage/issues/4568
* Implements a collator for tech docs.
  * Retrieves mkdocs created search index for entities that have documentation configured
* Registers collator to expose tech docs content to be searchable
* Modifies example search to contain tech docs
   * Displays docs results with link to docs and the entity name as title.
* Adds pagination to example search
* Creates a reusable type filter to be located in the

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "[TechDocs] Implement a DefaultTechDocsCollator" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
